requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity — Ley de Acceso a la Información Pública and Emerging Oversight (SAT / MINEX); No Mandatory Product Cybersecurity Certification Currently in Force
requirement_topic.zh: 网络安全——《公众信息获取法》及新兴监管框架（SAT / MINEX）；目前尚无强制性产品网络安全认证
requirement_topic.zht: 網路安全——《公眾資訊取得法》及新興監管框架（SAT / MINEX）；目前尚無強制性產品網路安全認證

summary.en: Guatemala does not currently have a specific mandatory cybersecurity product certification requirement for wireless or IoT consumer devices. The primary data protection and information access framework is the Ley de Acceso a la Información Pública (Decreto 57-2008), which governs access to public information and establishes principles for data handling by public entities. SAT (Superintendencia de Administración Tributaria) and MINEX (Ministerio de Relaciones Exteriores) exercise general oversight over data flows and import administration relevant to electronic devices. There is no Guatemalan equivalent to the European Union Cyber Resilience Act, the US FCC cybersecurity labelling programme, or China's MIIT network security certification for consumer IoT devices. As a result, cybersecurity obligations for imported wireless devices are advisory and reputational in nature rather than statutory at the product level as of the knowledge date. Exporters should monitor developments as Central American countries, including Guatemala, are increasingly engaging with regional and international cybersecurity frameworks.
summary.zh: 危地马拉目前对无线或物联网消费设备没有具体的强制性网络安全产品认证要求。主要的数据保护和信息获取框架为《公众信息获取法》（Decreto 57-2008），该法规范公共实体的公共信息获取和数据处理原则。SAT（税务局）和MINEX（外交部）对与电子设备相关的数据流和进口管理实施一般性监督。目前没有类似欧盟《网络弹性法》、美国FCC网络安全标识计划或中国工信部消费物联网设备网络安全认证的危地马拉等效制度。因此，截至本知识日期，进口无线设备的网络安全义务在产品层面属于指导性和声誉性质，而非法定要求。出口商应持续关注进展，因中美洲国家（包括危地马拉）正日益参与区域和国际网络安全框架。
summary.zht: 瓜地馬拉目前對無線或物聯網消費裝置沒有具體的強制性網路安全產品認證要求。主要的資料保護和資訊取得框架為《公眾資訊取得法》（Decreto 57-2008），該法規範公共實體的公共資訊取得和資料處理原則。SAT（稅務局）和MINEX（外交部）對與電子裝置相關的資料流和進口管理實施一般性監督。目前沒有類似歐盟《網路韌性法》、美國FCC網路安全標識計畫或中國工信部消費物聯網裝置網路安全認證的瓜地馬拉等效制度。因此，截至本知識日期，進口無線裝置的網路安全義務在產品層面屬於指導性和聲譽性質，而非法定要求。出口商應持續關注進展，因中美洲國家（包括瓜地馬拉）正日益參與區域和國際網路安全框架。

standards_or_laws: Ley de Acceso a la Información Pública (Decreto 57-2008) — Guatemalan public information access law; establishes data handling principles for public entities
SAT (Superintendencia de Administración Tributaria) — general import and tax administration oversight relevant to electronic device imports
MINEX (Ministerio de Relaciones Exteriores) — foreign affairs ministry; general oversight of cross-border data and import policy matters
No Guatemalan equivalent to EU Cyber Resilience Act, US FCC IoT Cybersecurity Label, or China MIIT network security certification currently in force for consumer wireless devices

summary.en: In China, wireless and IoT devices are subject to cybersecurity requirements under the Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (2017), the Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL, 2021), and MIIT network security standards including the MIIT network security graded protection (等保, Dengbao) framework. Specific IoT and network-connected device cybersecurity requirements apply under MIIT regulations and mandatory GB/T standards (e.g., GB/T 22239 for classified protection). China operates a mandatory network access licence (NAL) system for telecom terminal equipment with embedded cybersecurity review. These Chinese domestic cybersecurity requirements do not create equivalent certification obligations in Guatemala, where no mandatory product cybersecurity law for consumer devices is currently in force.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及物联网设备受2017年《网络安全法》、2021年《个人信息保护法》（PIPL）及工信部网络安全标准（包括工信部网络安全等级保护（等保）框架）的约束。根据工信部法规和强制GB/T标准（如等级保护GB/T 22239）对特定物联网和联网设备适用网络安全要求。中国对内置网络安全审查的电信终端设备实行强制进网许可证（NAL）制度。上述中国国内网络安全要求不在危地马拉产生等效认证义务，危地马拉目前尚无针对消费设备的强制性产品网络安全法律。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及物聯網裝置受2017年《網路安全法》、2021年《個人資訊保護法》（PIPL）及工信部網路安全標準（包括工信部網路安全等級保護（等保）框架）的約束。根據工信部法規和強制GB/T標準（如等級保護GB/T 22239）對特定物聯網和聯網裝置適用網路安全要求。中國對內置網路安全審查的電信終端裝置實行強制進網許可證（NAL）制度。上述中國國內網路安全要求不在瓜地馬拉產生等效認證義務，瓜地馬拉目前尚無針對消費裝置的強制性產品網路安全法律。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the PRC (2017) — Chinese mandatory cybersecurity framework for network operators and connected devices
Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL, 2021) — Chinese mandatory personal data protection law
MIIT NAL (Network Access Licence) — includes cybersecurity review component for telecom terminal equipment in China
GB/T 22239 — Chinese classified protection (等保 Dengbao) standard for network and information system security

gap.en: The cybersecurity gap between China and Guatemala is asymmetric: China has extensive mandatory product cybersecurity requirements (Cybersecurity Law, PIPL, MIIT NAL with cybersecurity review, Dengbao standards), while Guatemala currently has no mandatory product cybersecurity certification requirement for consumer wireless devices. For Chinese exporters, the practical cybersecurity obligation when entering Guatemala is minimal at the statutory level — no Guatemalan product cybersecurity certificate is required. However, exporters should monitor regulatory evolution in Central America, ensure their devices comply with any Guatemalan personal data handling principles under Decreto 57-2008 as applied to device data collection, and be prepared for future product cybersecurity requirements as Guatemala develops its digital regulatory framework.
gap.zh: 中危网络安全差距是不对称的：中国对产品网络安全有广泛的强制要求（《网络安全法》、PIPL、含网络安全审查的MIIT进网许可、等保标准），而危地马拉目前对消费无线设备没有强制性产品网络安全认证要求。对于中国出口商而言，进入危地马拉市场在法定层面的实际网络安全义务极低——无需危地马拉产品网络安全证书。但出口商应持续关注中美洲监管动态，确保其设备符合Decreto 57-2008下适用于设备数据采集的危地马拉个人数据处理原则，并为危地马拉数字监管框架发展带来的未来产品网络安全要求做好准备。
gap.zht: 中瓜網路安全差距是不對稱的：中國對產品網路安全有廣泛的強制要求（《網路安全法》、PIPL、含網路安全審查的MIIT進網許可、等保標準），而瓜地馬拉目前對消費無線裝置沒有強制性產品網路安全認證要求。對於中國出口商而言，進入瓜地馬拉市場在法定層面的實際網路安全義務極低——無需瓜地馬拉產品網路安全證書。但出口商應持續關注中美洲監管動態，確保其裝置符合Decreto 57-2008下適用於裝置資料採集的瓜地馬拉個人資料處理原則，並為瓜地馬拉數位監管框架發展帶來的未來產品網路安全要求做好準備。

mandatory_status.target: Advisory only — no mandatory product cybersecurity certification currently required for consumer wireless devices in Guatemala; Ley de Acceso a la Información Pública (Decreto 57-2008) applies to data handling by public entities; monitor regulatory developments
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Cybersecurity Law, PIPL, and MIIT NAL (with cybersecurity review) apply to wireless and connected devices in China; GB/T 22239 Dengbao classified protection applies to network-connected systems

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Guatemala does not currently impose a mandatory product cybersecurity certification requirement for consumer wireless or IoT devices. The Ley de Acceso a la Información Pública (Decreto 57-2008) governs data handling by public entities and establishes advisory principles relevant to device data collection. No Guatemalan equivalent to the EU Cyber Resilience Act or US FCC IoT cybersecurity label is currently in force. Chinese exporters face minimal statutory cybersecurity certification obligations at the product level for the Guatemalan market as of the knowledge date. Monitor Guatemalan and Central American cybersecurity regulatory developments and verify the current legal position with a qualified Guatemalan regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 危地马拉目前对消费无线或物联网设备不实施强制性产品网络安全认证要求。《公众信息获取法》（Decreto 57-2008）规范公共实体的数据处理，并就设备数据采集建立了指导性原则。目前尚无类似欧盟《网络弹性法》或美国FCC物联网网络安全标识的危地马拉等效制度。截至本知识日期，中国出口商在产品层面面临的危地马拉市场法定网络安全认证义务极低。请持续关注危地马拉及中美洲网络安全监管动态，并在进入市场前向合格的危地马拉监管专业人士核验现行法律状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 瓜地馬拉目前對消費無線或物聯網裝置不實施強制性產品網路安全認證要求。《公眾資訊取得法》（Decreto 57-2008）規範公共實體的資料處理，並就裝置資料採集建立了指導性原則。目前尚無類似歐盟《網路韌性法》或美國FCC物聯網網路安全標識的瓜地馬拉等效制度。截至本知識日期，中國出口商在產品層面面臨的瓜地馬拉市場法定網路安全認證義務極低。請持續關注瓜地馬拉及中美洲網路安全監管動態，並在進入市場前向合格的瓜地馬拉監管專業人士核驗現行法律狀態。
